product_overview: A Next.js TypeScript frontend that provides user authentication, account/profile management, and a loyalty rewards page. The PRD focuses on form-driven flows (sign in, sign up, privacy settings, loyalty redemption) and their happy and error paths; note the original raw PRD text on page 1 states: "test my frontend interface using test sprite MCP to test all forms inside my app including auth singin -signup."
core_goals: Provide reliable sign-in and sign-up flows with clear success and error states.
Allow authenticated users to manage privacy and cookie/tracking preferences.
Expose a loyalty page where users can view and redeem points.
Ensure routes and UI flows are testable and deterministic for automated form testing (TestSprite).

features.name: User Authentication (Sign In)
features.description: Allow existing users to sign in using email and password and receive an auth token; handle invalid credentials and server errors with clear messages.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email field with a valid email -> Fill password field with correct password -> Click Sign In button -> POST /auth/v1/token -> Receive auth token -> Redirect to /account -> See account overview/dashboard

Navigate to /login -> Fill email field with a valid email -> Fill password field with incorrect password -> Click Sign In button -> POST /auth/v1/token -> Receive 401 error -> See inline error message indicating invalid credentials

Navigate to /login -> Fill email field with invalid email format -> Fill password field -> Click Sign In button -> Client-side validation prevents submit or shows format error -> See validation error message next to email field
Navigate to /login -> Fill email and password fields -> Click Sign In button -> POST /auth/v1/token -> Network or server error response -> See generic error banner suggesting retry

features.name: User Authentication (Sign Up)
features.description: Allow new users to register with name, email and password, obtain authentication, and be redirected to their account. Handle duplicate emails and weak passwords with explicit errors.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Fill name field with valid name -> Fill email field with valid email -> Fill password field meeting requirements -> Click Sign Up button -> POST /auth/v1/token (or sign-up endpoint) -> Receive auth token -> Redirect to /account -> See account overview/dashboard

Navigate to /register -> Fill name field -> Fill email field with already-registered email -> Fill password field -> Click Sign Up button -> POST /auth/v1/token -> Receive 409/duplicate-email response -> See inline error indicating email is already in use

Navigate to /register -> Fill name field -> Fill email field -> Fill password field that does not meet strength rules -> Click Sign Up button -> Client-side validation shows password strength error -> See validation message and prevent submission
Navigate to /register -> Fill fields correctly -> Click Sign Up button -> Server error on sign-up -> See generic error banner with retry option

features.name: Account Settings (Privacy Settings)
features.description: Authenticated users can open privacy settings, toggle cookie/tracking preferences, and save changes; unauthenticated users are redirected to sign in.
user_flows: Navigate to /account -> Click on privacy settings -> Toggle cookies or tracking preferences to desired state -> Click Save settings -> See confirmation message and updated preferences persisted
Navigate to /account -> Click on privacy settings -> Toggle preferences -> Click Save settings -> Server returns error on save -> See inline error and settings remain unchanged
Navigate to /account -> If not authenticated, attempt to access /account -> Redirect to /login -> See prompt to sign in

features.name: Loyalty Points & Rewards
features.description: Authenticated users view loyalty balance, browse rewards, and redeem points; handle insufficient points and ensure unauthenticated access redirects to login.
user_flows: Navigate to /account/loyalty -> See current loyalty points balance and available rewards list -> Click Redeem on an available reward -> Confirm redemption -> Receive success message -> See updated points balance
Navigate to /account/loyalty -> See rewards list -> Click Redeem on a reward requiring more points than available -> See error message indicating insufficient points
Navigate to /account/loyalty -> If not authenticated, attempt to access /account/loyalty -> Redirect to /login -> See prompt to sign in

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign in and Sign up flows for users
user_interactions: Fill email and password in login form
Fill name, email, and password in register form
